Impacted is the function get_tokenizer of the file python/sglang/srt/utils/hf_transformers_utils.py of the component HuggingFace Transformer Handler. The manipulation results in deserialization. The attack can be executed remotely. A high complexity level is associated with this attack. The exploitability is considered difficult.
